family.$description: Primary font names for Figma Variable binding (FONT_FAMILY scope, STRING type). One name per slot — no CSS stacks. CSS output uses the full stack via expand-font-stacks.mjs. Update these when the project font is finalized.

sans.$description: Default sans-serif. CSS stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

serif.$description: Default serif. CSS stack: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif

mono.$description: Monospace / code. CSS stack: 'Monaco', 'Menlo', 'Ubuntu Mono', monospace

tabular.$description: Tabular numbers in data tables. CSS stack: 'Courier New', monospace

size.$description: Unitless px values. CSS output → rem (÷16).

leading.$description: Line-height stored as percent (120 = 120% = 1.2× in CSS). Figma uses PERCENT unit natively; CSS generation divides by 100 to get the ratio. Key name = the percent value.

tracking.$description: Letter-spacing as FLOAT percent values for Figma Variables (LETTER_SPACING scope). Figma stores letter-spacing in %. CSS/DTCG conversion: Figma% ÷ 100 = em value. Example: Figma 2.5% = 0.025em in CSS.

style.$description: Figma font style strings (FONT_STYLE scope, STRING type). These match the exact style name Figma uses in fontName.style — used to bind text styles' fontStyle property to a variable. Values are font-agnostic (Inter 'Bold' and Roboto Mono 'Bold' share the same variable).

semibold.$description: Maps to font-weight: 600 in CSS. Note: 'Semi Bold' with a space (Inter naming convention)
